<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>MODITEX GROUP — Etiquetas de Envío</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg:#ffffff; --bg2:#fafafa; --bg3:#f4f4f4;
  --border:rgba(0,0,0,0.10); --border-s:rgba(0,0,0,0.20);
  --ink:#111111; --ink-dim:#444444; --ink-muted:#666666;
  --red:#d91e1e; --red-deep:#b81818; --red-soft:rgba(217,30,30,0.07);
  --gold:#c9a84c; --gold-soft:rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  --green:#1a7a3c; --r:2px;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:13px}
.screen{display:flex;min-height:100vh}
.panel{width:420px;min-height:100vh;background:var(--bg2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex-shrink:0}
.preview-area{flex:1;padding:32px;background:var(--bg3);overflow-y:auto}
.panel-header{padding:28px 24px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.logo-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
.logo-img{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain;background:#000;border-radius:var(--r);padding:8px;flex-shrink:0}
.logo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px}
.logo-moditex{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}
.logo-group{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.28em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.panel-title{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--ink-muted);letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:6px}
.panel-body{flex:1;padding:20px 24px;overflow-y:auto}
.sec-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--ink-muted);letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;margin-top:18px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.sec-label:first-child{margin-top:0}
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.form-group.span2{grid-column:span 2}
.form-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;color:var(--ink-muted);letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase}
.form-input,.form-select{padding:9px 11px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink);outline:none;transition:border-color .14s;width:100%}
.form-input:focus,.form-select:focus{border-color:var(--ink)}
.form-input::placeholder{color:#aaa}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;padding:9px 18px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .14s;border-radius:var(--r);white-space:nowrap}
.btn-primary{background:var(--ink);color:#fff}
.btn-primary:hover{background:#333}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:#333;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.22)}
.btn-ghost:hover{background:#efefef}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 12px;font-size:10px}
.btn-print{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;padding:11px 28px;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.08em}
.btn-print:hover{background:#333}
.dest-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}
.dest-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);transition:border-color .13s}
.dest-item:hover{border-color:var(--border-s)}
.dest-num{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);min-width:18px}
.dest-info{flex:1}
.dest-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.3}
.dest-meta{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.dest-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0}
.dest-btn{width:26px;height:26px;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-dim);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .12s}
.dest-empty{text-align:center;padding:28px;background:var(--bg);border:1px dashed var(--border-s);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--ink-muted)}
.layout-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:8px}
.layout-opt{padding:10px 6px;text-align:center;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .13s}
.layout-opt:hover{border-color:var(--border-s)}
.layout-opt.active{border-color:var(--ink);background:var(--ink);color:#fff}
.layout-opt .lo-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;line-height:1}
.layout-opt .lo-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:3px;opacity:.7}
.toast-wrap{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.toast{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:11px 16px;background:var(--ink);color:#fff;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;border-left:3px solid var(--red);min-width:220px;animation:toastIn .22s ease}
.toast.ok{border-left-color:var(--green)}
@keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(20px);opacity:0}to{transform:none;opacity:1}}
.edit-banner{display:none;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--gold-soft);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.35);margin-bottom:14px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:#6b4900}
.edit-banner.visible{display:flex}
.preview-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px}
.preview-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700}
.preview-sub{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-top:2px}
.preview-page{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border-s);box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);margin-bottom:20px}
.etiqueta-wrap{padding:8px}
.grid-4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0}
.grid-6{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0}
.grid-9{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0}
.etiqueta{border:1px solid #ddd;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;position:relative;background:#fff;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif}
.et-stripe{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:10px;background:#000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px}
.et-stripe-logo{width:32px;height:32px;object-fit:contain;transform:rotate(-90deg);filter:invert(1);flex-shrink:0}
.et-stripe-text{writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:6px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap}
.et-body{margin-left:10px;padding:10px 10px 10px 12px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;min-height:0}
.et-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px}
.et-num{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;background:#000;padding:2px 6px;letter-spacing:.06em;flex-shrink:0}
.et-nombre{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;color:#111;line-height:1.25;flex:1}
.et-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:5px;margin-bottom:3px}
.et-icon{font-size:9px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;opacity:.6}
.et-val{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#333;line-height:1.3}
.et-label-tag{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0}
.et-divider{border:none;border-top:1px dashed #ddd;margin:6px 0}
.et-footer{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.et-ref{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;background:var(--red);color:#fff;padding:2px 7px;letter-spacing:.06em}
.et-brand{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;color:#aaa;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em}
.et-nota{font-size:9px;color:#888;font-style:italic;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;margin-top:3px}

/* Nuevo: logo top-right en etiqueta */
.et-logo-corner{position:absolute;top:7px;right:7px;width:28px;height:28px;object-fit:contain;background:#000;border-radius:2px;padding:4px;opacity:.85}

.grid-4 .etiqueta{height:92mm}
.grid-4 .et-nombre{font-size:26px}
.grid-4 .et-val{font-size:15px}
.grid-4 .et-icon{font-size:11px}
.grid-4 .et-label-tag{font-size:9px}
.grid-4 .et-ref{font-size:10px}
.grid-4 .et-brand{font-size:8px}
.grid-4 .et-nota{font-size:10px}
.grid-4 .et-num{font-size:10px}
.grid-4 .et-body{padding:14px 14px 14px 14px}
.grid-4 .et-row{margin-bottom:10px}
.grid-4 .et-logo-corner{width:36px;height:36px;top:10px;right:10px}

.grid-6 .etiqueta{height:60mm}
.grid-6 .et-nombre{font-size:17px}
.grid-6 .et-val{font-size:11px}
.grid-6 .et-icon{font-size:11px}
.grid-6 .et-label-tag{font-size:9px}
.grid-6 .et-ref{font-size:10px}
.grid-6 .et-brand{font-size:8px}
.grid-6 .et-nota{font-size:9px}
.grid-6 .et-num{font-size:10px}
.grid-6 .et-logo-corner{width:36px;height:36px}
.grid-6 .et-body{padding:9px 12px 9px 14px}
.grid-6 .et-row{margin-bottom:4px}
.grid-6 .et-header{margin-bottom:6px}
.grid-6 .et-divider{margin:5px 0}

.grid-9 .etiqueta{height:60mm}
.grid-9 .et-nombre{font-size:13px}
.grid-9 .et-val{font-size:10px}
.grid-9 .et-icon{font-size:9px}
.grid-9 .et-label-tag{font-size:7px}
.grid-9 .et-ref{font-size:8px}
.grid-9 .et-brand{font-size:6px}
.grid-9 .et-nota{font-size:7px}
.grid-9 .et-num{font-size:8px}
.grid-9 .et-body{padding:7px 8px 7px 10px}
.grid-9 .et-divider{margin:3px 0}
.grid-9 .et-row{margin-bottom:2px}
.grid-9 .et-header{margin-bottom:3px}
.grid-9 .et-stripe{width:8px}
.grid-9 .et-logo-corner{width:20px;height:20px;top:5px;right:5px;padding:3px}

.et-empty{border:1px dashed #eee;background:#fafafa}
@media print{
  @page{size:Letter landscape;margin:6mm}
  body{background:#fff}
  .screen{display:block}
  .panel,.preview-header,.toast-wrap{display:none !important}
  .preview-area{padding:0;background:#fff;overflow:visible}
  .preview-page{box-shadow:none;border:none;margin:0;page-break-after:always}
  .preview-page:last-child{page-break-after:avoid}
  .etiqueta-wrap{padding:2mm}
  .etiqueta{page-break-inside:avoid}
  .et-empty{border:none !important;background:transparent !important}
}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .screen{flex-direction:column}
  .panel{width:100%;min-height:auto}
  .preview-area{padding:20px}
}

/* ── THANK YOU BANNER ── */
.et-thankyou {
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:5px 8px 6px;
  background:#000;
  text-align:center;
  gap:1px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.et-ty-main {
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#fff;
  letter-spacing:.06em;
  line-height:1.2;
}
.et-ty-sub {
  font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
  color:var(--gold);
  letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  line-height:1;
}

/* Sizes per layout */
.grid-4 .et-thankyou { padding:8px 12px 9px; gap:2px; }
.grid-4 .et-ty-main  { font-size:13px; }
.grid-4 .et-ty-sub   { font-size:8px; }

.grid-6 .et-thankyou { padding:4px 8px 4px; }
.grid-6 .et-ty-main  { font-size:11px; }
.grid-6 .et-ty-sub   { font-size:7px; }

.grid-9 .et-thankyou { padding:3px 6px 4px; }
.grid-9 .et-ty-main  { font-size:9px; }
.grid-9 .et-ty-sub   { font-size:6px; }

</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="screen">
  <aside class="panel">
    <div class="panel-header">
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img class="logo-img" id="panel-logo" src="" alt="Moditex">
        <div class="logo-text">
          <div class="logo-moditex">MODITEX</div>
          <div class="logo-group">GROUP</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-title">Generador de Etiquetas de Envío</div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel-body">
      <div class="edit-banner" id="edit-banner">
        ✏️ <span>Editando destinatario <strong id="edit-num">#1</strong> — guarda o cancela abajo</span>
        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="cancelarEdicion()" style="margin-left:auto">Cancelar</button>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-label">Datos del Destinatario</div>
      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group span2">
          <label class="form-label">Nombre completo *</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-nombre" placeholder="Ej: María González">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group span2">
          <label class="form-label">Cédula de Identidad</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-cedula" placeholder="V-12345678">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Teléfono</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-telefono" placeholder="+58 412 000 0000">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Email</label>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" id="f-email" placeholder="correo@ejemplo.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Agencia</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-agencia" placeholder="MRW, Zoom, TEALCA...">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Ciudad destino</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-ciudad" placeholder="Caracas, Maracaibo...">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group span2">
          <label class="form-label">Referencia del pedido</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-referencia" placeholder="PED-2025-001">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group span2">
          <label class="form-label">Nota / Instrucción especial</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" id="f-nota" placeholder="Frágil, entregar en mano...">
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="btn-agregar" onclick="agregarOActualizar()" style="width:100%;margin-top:12px">+ Agregar Destinatario</button>
      <div class="sec-label" style="margin-top:24px">Lista de Destinatarios</div>
      <div class="dest-list" id="dest-list">
        <div class="dest-empty" id="dest-empty">Aún no hay destinatarios.<br>Completa el formulario y agrega uno.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-label" style="margin-top:24px">Layout de Impresión</div>
      <div class="layout-grid">
        <div class="layout-opt" id="lo-4" onclick="setLayout(4)">
          <div class="lo-num">4</div><div class="lo-label">2×2 · Grandes</div>
        </div>
        <div class="layout-opt active" id="lo-6" onclick="setLayout(6)">
          <div class="lo-num">6</div><div class="lo-label">2×3 · Medianas</div>
        </div>
        <div class="layout-opt" id="lo-9" onclick="setLayout(9)">
          <div class="lo-num">9</div><div class="lo-label">3×3 · Pequeñas</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:12px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--ink-muted);line-height:1.6">
        📄 Papel Carta · Orientación Horizontal<br>
        🔒 Isotipo MODITEX en panel y en cada etiqueta<br>
        ✉️ Incluye: nombre, cédula, tel, email, agencia y ciudad
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:16px 24px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
      <button class="btn btn-print" style="width:100%" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ Imprimir Etiquetas</button>
    </div>
  </aside>
  <div class="preview-area">
    <div class="preview-header">
      <div>
        <div class="preview-title">Vista Previa</div>
        <div class="preview-sub" id="prev-sub">0 destinatarios · Layout 6 por página</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="limpiarTodo()">🗑 Limpiar todo</button>
    </div>
    <div id="pages-wrap"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="toast-wrap" id="toasts"></div>
<script>
var destinatarios=[];
var editIndex=-1;
var layout=6;
var LOGO_B64='data:image/png;base64,';

// Set logo in panel header
document.getElementById('panel-logo').src = LOGO_B64;

function toast(msg,type){
  type=type||'ok';
  var t=document.createElement('div');
  t.className='toast '+type;
  t.innerHTML='<span>'+(type==='ok'?'✓':'✕')+'</span> '+msg;
  document.getElementById('toasts').appendChild(t);
  setTimeout(function(){t.style.opacity='0';t.style.transition='opacity .3s';setTimeout(function(){t.remove()},300)},3200);
}
function getFields(){
  return{
    nombre:(document.getElementById('f-nombre').value||'').trim(),
    cedula:(document.getElementById('f-cedula').value||'').trim(),
    telefono:(document.getElementById('f-telefono').value||'').trim(),
    email:(document.getElementById('f-email').value||'').trim(),
    agencia:(document.getElementById('f-agencia').value||'').trim(),
    ciudad:(document.getElementById('f-ciudad').value||'').trim(),
    referencia:(document.getElementById('f-referencia').value||'').trim(),
    nota:(document.getElementById('f-nota').value||'').trim()
  };
}
function fillFields(d){
  document.getElementById('f-nombre').value=d.nombre||'';
  document.getElementById('f-cedula').value=d.cedula||'';
  document.getElementById('f-telefono').value=d.telefono||'';
  document.getElementById('f-email').value=d.email||'';
  document.getElementById('f-agencia').value=d.agencia||'';
  document.getElementById('f-ciudad').value=d.ciudad||'';
  document.getElementById('f-referencia').value=d.referencia||'';
  document.getElementById('f-nota').value=d.nota||'';
}
function clearFields(){
  ['f-nombre','f-cedula','f-telefono','f-email','f-agencia','f-ciudad','f-referencia','f-nota']
    .forEach(function(id){document.getElementById(id).value=''});
}
function esc(s){return(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}
function agregarOActualizar(){
  var d=getFields();
  if(!d.nombre){toast('El nombre es obligatorio','err');return;}
  if(editIndex>=0){
    destinatarios[editIndex]=d;
    toast('Destinatario #'+(editIndex+1)+' actualizado ✓','ok');
    salirModoEdicion();
  }else{
    destinatarios.push(d);
    toast('Destinatario agregado ('+destinatarios.length+' en total)','ok');
    clearFields();
  }
  renderList();renderPages();
}
function editarDest(i){
  editIndex=i;fillFields(destinatarios[i]);
  document.getElementById('edit-banner').classList.add('visible');
  document.getElementById('edit-num').textContent='#'+(i+1);
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').textContent='✓ Guardar Cambios';
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').style.background='var(--gold)';
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').style.color='#000';
  document.getElementById('f-nombre').focus();
}
function cancelarEdicion(){salirModoEdicion();clearFields();toast('Edición cancelada','ok')}
function salirModoEdicion(){
  editIndex=-1;
  document.getElementById('edit-banner').classList.remove('visible');
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').textContent='+ Agregar Destinatario';
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').style.background='';
  document.getElementById('btn-agregar').style.color='';
}
function eliminarDest(i){
  var nombre=destinatarios[i].nombre||'destinatario';
  destinatarios.splice(i,1);
  if(editIndex===i)salirModoEdicion();
  else if(editIndex>i)editIndex--;
  toast('"'+nombre+'" eliminado','ok');
  renderList();renderPages();
}
function limpiarTodo(){
  if(destinatarios.length&&!confirm('¿Limpiar todos los destinatarios?'))return;
  destinatarios=[];salirModoEdicion();clearFields();renderList();renderPages();
  toast('Lista limpiada','ok');
}
function setLayout(n){
  layout=n;
  [4,6,9].forEach(function(x){document.getElementById('lo-'+x).classList.toggle('active',x===n)});
  renderPages();
}
function renderList(){
  var wrap=document.getElementById('dest-list');
  var empty=document.getElementById('dest-empty');
  if(!destinatarios.length){
    empty.style.display='block';
    wrap.querySelectorAll('.dest-item').forEach(function(el){el.remove()});
    return;
  }
  empty.style.display='none';
  wrap.querySelectorAll('.dest-item').forEach(function(el){el.remove()});
  destinatarios.forEach(function(d,i){
    var div=document.createElement('div');
    div.className='dest-item';
    var meta=[d.cedula,d.telefono,d.ciudad].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
    div.innerHTML=
      '<div class="dest-num">#'+(i+1)+'</div>'+
      '<div class="dest-info">'+
        '<div class="dest-name">'+esc(d.nombre)+'</div>'+
        '<div class="dest-meta">'+esc(meta||(d.agencia||'—'))+'</div>'+
      '</div>'+
      '<div class="dest-actions">'+
        '<button class="dest-btn edit" onclick="editarDest('+i+')" title="Editar">✏️</button>'+
        '<button class="dest-btn del" onclick="eliminarDest('+i+')" title="Eliminar">✕</button>'+
      '</div>';
    wrap.appendChild(div);
  });
}
function etiquetaHTML(d,num){
  if(!d)return '<div class="etiqueta et-empty"></div>';
  return '<div class="etiqueta">'+
    '<div class="et-stripe">'+
      '<img class="et-stripe-logo" src="'+LOGO_B64+'" alt="M">'+
      '<div class="et-stripe-text">MODITEX GROUP</div>'+
    '</div>'+
    '<img class="et-logo-corner" src="'+LOGO_B64+'" alt="Moditex">'+
    '<div class="et-body">'+
      '<div>'+
        '<div class="et-header">'+
          '<div class="et-nombre">'+esc(d.nombre)+'</div>'+
          '<div class="et-num">#'+num+'</div>'+
        '</div>'+
        (d.cedula?'<div class="et-row"><span class="et-icon">🪪</span><span class="et-val">'+esc(d.cedula)+'</span></div>':'')+
        (d.telefono?'<div class="et-row"><span class="et-icon">📱</span><span class="et-val">'+esc(d.telefono)+'</span></div>':'')+
        (d.email?'<div class="et-row"><span class="et-icon">✉️</span><span class="et-val">'+esc(d.email)+'</span></div>':'')+
        ((d.agencia||d.ciudad)?'<div class="et-row"><span class="et-icon">📦</span><span class="et-label-tag">'+esc(d.agencia||'')+'</span>'+(d.ciudad?'<span class="et-val" style="margin-left:4px">→ '+esc(d.ciudad)+'</span>':'')+'</div>':'')+
      '</div>'+
      '<div>'+
        '<hr class="et-divider">'+
        '<div class="et-footer">'+
          (d.referencia?'<div class="et-ref">'+esc(d.referencia)+'</div>':'<div></div>')+
          '<div class="et-brand">MODITEX · BQto</div>'+
        '</div>'+
        (d.nota?'<div class="et-nota">📝 '+esc(d.nota)+'</div>':'')+
      '</div>'+
    '</div>'+
    '<div class="et-thankyou">'+
      '<div class="et-ty-main">¡Gracias por tu compra!</div>'+
      '<div class="et-ty-sub">MODITEX GROUP · BQto</div>'+
    '</div>'+
  '</div>';
}
function renderPages(){
  var wrap=document.getElementById('pages-wrap');
  var sub=document.getElementById('prev-sub');
  var cols=layout===4?2:layout===6?2:3;
  var rows=layout===4?2:layout===6?3:3;
  var perPage=cols*rows;
  var gridClass='grid-'+layout;
  sub.textContent=destinatarios.length+' destinatario'+(destinatarios.length!==1?'s':'')+' · Layout '+layout+' por página ('+cols+'×'+rows+')';
  if(!destinatarios.length){
    wrap.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;padding:60px 40px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);color:#888;font-family:\'DM Mono\',monospace;font-size:12px">🏷️ Agrega destinatarios para ver la vista previa</div>';
    return;
  }
  var pages=Math.ceil(destinatarios.length/perPage);
  var html='';
  for(var p=0;p<pages;p++){
    html+='<div class="preview-page"><div class="etiqueta-wrap"><div class="'+gridClass+'">';
    for(var s=0;s<perPage;s++){
      var idx=p*perPage+s;
      html+=idx<destinatarios.length?etiquetaHTML(destinatarios[idx],idx+1):'<div class="etiqueta et-empty"></div>';
    }
    html+='</div></div></div>';
  }
  wrap.innerHTML=html;
}
(function parseUrlData(){
  try{
    var params=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    var raw=params.get('data');if(!raw)return;
    var arr=JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(raw));if(!Array.isArray(arr))return;
    arr.forEach(function(d){if(d&&d.nombre)destinatarios.push({nombre:d.nombre||'',cedula:d.cedula||'',telefono:d.telefono||'',email:d.email||'',agencia:d.agencia||'',ciudad:d.ciudad||'',referencia:d.ref||d.referencia||'',nota:d.nota||''})});
    if(destinatarios.length){renderList();renderPages();}
  }catch(e){}
})();
renderList();renderPages();
document.querySelectorAll('.form-input').forEach(function(inp,i,all){
  inp.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){
    if(e.key==='Enter'){e.preventDefault();if(i<all.length-1)all[i+1].focus();else agregarOActualizar();}
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
